title: MGN 447 (M+F) Amendment 4 control of noise at work - seeking exemptions
body: "This notice should be read in conjunction with MGN 658 (M+F) the merchant shipping and fishing vessel (control of noise at work) regulations 2007 and MGN 636 (M) amendment 4 the merchant shipping and fishing vessel (health and safety at work) regulations 1997 and  ILO work in fishing convention health and safety responsibilities. MGN 587 (F) amendment 1 ILO work in fishing convention health and safety responsibilities.  Amendment 4 updates references only.  Notice to:   all ship and fishing vessel owners operators and managers other employers of seafarers masters, officers and ratings of merchant ships skippers and crew of fishing vessels small commercially operated vessels yachts with paid crew  "
